expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with multiple user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Notification Center",
  "branchName": "notification-center",
  "description": "Users need a notification center to manage their notifications and read states.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add notification persistence schema",
      "description": "As a system, I want to store notification read state so it persists across sessions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Create database schema for notifications and read state",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["schema.ts"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add notification list UI and unread badges",
      "description": "As a user, I want to see unread badges and open a notification list.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Badge shows count of unread notifications",
        "Clicking opens the notification list",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["components/NotificationBadge.tsx", "components/NotificationList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add read/unread state updates",
      "description": "As a user, I want to mark notifications read or unread.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend action to update read state",
        "UI toggle to mark read or unread",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["api/notifications.ts", "components/NotificationItem.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add read state filter",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter the notification list by read state.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "UI filter control for read/unread",
        "List updates based on filter",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["components/NotificationList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add clear read notifications feature",
      "description": "As a user, I want to clear all read notifications.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend action to clear read notifications",
        "UI button to clear read notifications",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": ["api/notifications.ts", "components/NotificationList.tsx"],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover persistence, badge or list UI, read-state updates, filtering, and clearing read notifications.
